visual_quality.notes: All 10 criteria pass: 2 font families (DM Serif Display + DM Sans), 3rem hero vs 1rem body (3x+), all colors via CSS variables, 120px section padding, hero clamp(3rem) largest, 13 transitions/animations, 8 grid variations, dark impact section, 10 hover states, max 1 CTA per section viewport.

brand_consistency.notes: DM Serif Display + DM Sans match updated brand guidelines exactly. All brand colors present (#1D5F8A, #F7941D, #333333, #FFFFFF, #F5F5F5). CSS variables enforce consistency. 0 deviations.

content_accuracy.notes: 8/8 key terms found. All product features, impact numbers (101K+, $10:1, 350K+, 80+), value proposition, and Learn/Deliver/Verify & Pay flow present. 4 impact stats vs 3 in v001.

responsiveness.notes: 9/10 criteria pass: viewport meta present, 3 media queries (768px, 480px, 1024px), fluid typography (5 clamp() uses), flexbox+grid (13 instances), overflow-x hidden on body, grids wrap on mobile, nav adapts. Missing: explicit min-height 44px on touch targets (buttons use padding instead). No explicit touch target size.

code_quality.notes: 0 issues. DOCTYPE present, viewport meta, semantic HTML (header, main, 4 sections, footer, nav, article elements), 7 aria-labels, 10 aria-hidden on decorative elements, sr-only class for screen readers. All SVGs have aria-hidden. No broken references.
